name: NetSuite
description: Oracle NetSuite ERP - monitors employee access and role-based access controls via SuiteQL REST API with OAuth1 Token-Based Authentication.

credentialFields.label: Account ID
credentialFields.helpText: Your NetSuite Account ID (e.g., 1234567 or TSTDRV1234567). Found at Setup > Company > Company Information.

credentialFields.label: Consumer Key
credentialFields.helpText: Integration consumer key. Found at Setup > Integration > Manage Integrations.

credentialFields.label: Consumer Secret
credentialFields.helpText: Integration consumer secret. Displayed only once when creating the integration.

credentialFields.label: Token ID
credentialFields.helpText: Access token ID. Found at Setup > Users/Roles > Access Tokens.

credentialFields.label: Token Secret
credentialFields.helpText: Access token secret. Displayed only once when creating the token.

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Lists all employees in NetSuite via SuiteQL to verify employee access records are maintained and accounts have proper status.

checks.name: Role-based Access Controls
checks.description: Lists all roles defined in NetSuite via SuiteQL to verify that role-based access controls are properly configured.
